pageContext.name: The Flash 3oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Since the Golden Age, THE FLASH™ has been a prominent hero in the DC universe. There have been many renditions of The Fastest Man Alive, arguably, the most popular identities to have graced the mantle are Jay Garrick, Barry Allen, and Wally West — each redefining what it means to be a hero.   The coin includes intricate engravings and shows THE FLASH posing powerfully. This large 3oz silver coin, with an impressive 55mm diameter, displays a fantastic montage of classic THE FLASH comic artwork.  Each coin comes in a high-quality, custom-themed case with a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender. The coin's unique number in its limited mintage is also provided.  Grab your favorite today before it speeds by!
